hook: The more clearly you know your standards, the less likely you are to romanticize confusion.
body: Standards turn chemistry from a blinding force into one meaningful signal among others.

hook: If your standards are vague, attraction can talk you into almost anything.
body: Define what stable interest, kindness, and reciprocity look like before the next exciting person shows up.

hook: Define what stable interest, kindness, and reciprocity look like before the next exciting person shows up.
body: Knowing that unreliability is a deal-breaker helps you see mixed behavior sooner instead of later.

hook: Knowing that unreliability is a deal-breaker helps you see mixed behavior sooner instead of later.
body: Write your top three relational standards in behavior language, not feeling language.
